category_sources: source_facts.description says lightweight lockfile for conda environments; official docs say conda-lock generates fully reproducible lock files for conda environments.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is conda-lock; official docs and GitHub repository use conda-lock.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation is linked from the conda-lock repository and contains features, installation, usage, and CLI reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; official docs link back to GitHub and describe conda-lock.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names conda environment lockfiles; official docs describe reproducible lock files, pip support, source formats, and conda installation.
